scope: brand-new 10-page triple-perspective trilingual audit, seed 20260526, disjoint from all prior 195 audited pages

findings.defect: Surface scope divergence across languages: jp='ハルシネーション（Hallucination：幻覚）', zh='AI幻觉（Hallucination）', en='Hallucination'. ZH adds 'AI' prefix narrowing scope; JP adds '：幻覚' gloss; EN is bare. Within-page surface should agree on scope.
findings.evidence_excerpt: jp:ハルシネーション（Hallucination：幻覚） / zh:AI幻觉（Hallucination） / en:Hallucination

findings.defect: Nested fullwidth parens awkward for reader: '这三个特征（3V（大数据特征））' — the outer paren wraps the (already-parenthesized) 3V surface, producing double fullwidth nesting which is uncommon in zh typography.
findings.evidence_excerpt: 「数据更新频率高（Velocity）」「数据种类多样（Variety）」这三个特征（3V（大数据特征））

findings.defect: Choice B EN translates 'あるべき方向' as 'To-Be State' (Pascal-cased, enterprise-architecture jargon). For IT Passport beginner level this raises cognitive load; natural rendering would be 'the desired direction' or 'the ideal state'. Choice is technically defensible (TOGAF usage) but register mismatched.
findings.evidence_excerpt: Organizational capability that guides the formulation and execution of IT strategy and leads it toward the To-Be State so that the company can build competitive advantage

findings.defect: Entity surface is a comparison ('NFCとQRコードの違い' / 'NFC与二维码的区别' / 'Difference between NFC and QR Code') but definition only describes NFC ('NFCはメモリに何度も読み書きできること'). Educator perspective: pedagogically incomplete — does not state QR-code side of the difference. Faithful to source bullet but learner reading only this leaf cannot answer 'what is the difference'.
findings.evidence_excerpt: surface: 'NFCとQRコードの違い'; definition: 'NFCはメモリに何度も読み書きできること'

findings.defect: ZH choice C format inconsistency: 'C. 物料需求计划（MRP）' uses 'expansion（abbr）' order while sibling choices use 'abbr（expansion）' order ('B. ERP（企业资源计划）', 'D. 供应链管理（SCM）' — even D varies). Within one MCQ, format should be uniform.
findings.evidence_excerpt: B. ERP（企业资源计划） / C. 物料需求计划（MRP） / D. 供应链管理（SCM）

findings.defect: ZH uses ASCII straight double-quotes around '同时' while the rest of the file consistently uses 「」or fullwidth quotes. Minor punctuation inconsistency.
Cross-page surface inconsistency for Hallucination: p152 jp='ハルシネーション（Hallucination：幻覚）' while p560 jp='ハルシネーション'. Acceptable since p560 is summary-style, but flag for glossary canonicalization.
findings.evidence_excerpt: p152.jp: ハルシネーション（Hallucination：幻覚） / p560.jp: ハルシネーション

findings.defect: ZH choice D 'SWOT分析' lacks expansion gloss while siblings A/B/C all carry '（...）' expansions. Reader-style minor inconsistency.
findings.evidence_excerpt: A. BSC（平衡计分卡）/ B. CSF（关键成功因素）/ C. PPM（产品组合管理）/ D. SWOT分析
